message:
fix: drop+recreate FTS on full reset; batch historical imports with queryable-first sort

FTS reset:
- reset_storage() no longer uses FTS5 delete-all control column (not
  implemented in frankensqlite). Instead DROP + recreate fts_messages
  table via rusqlite fallback, then re-register on frankensqlite conn.
- Function gains db_path parameter for rusqlite fallback path.

Historical database discovery:
- Scan repair-lab/ and snapshots/ subdirectories for additional bundles
- Add supports_direct_readonly probe (rusqlite open + table check)
- Sort order prefers queryable bundles over merely large ones
- Batch import: 128 convos or 10k messages per batch via
  insert_conversations_batched instead of row-at-a-time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
